name: PROSPERITY-XH-Dashboard
description: TapTouch-powered restaurant operations dashboard for PROSPERITY XH

scripts.build: npm run render:web && vite build --config web/vite.config.mjs
scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check scraper.js && node --check app.js && node --check mobile.js && node --check browser.js && node --check runtime-config.js
